title: Governance update: high-severity report actions
body: Today’s high-severity moderation pass is complete. We banned spam_wave_42 for posting phishing links across multiple channels and banned toxic_runner for repeated targeted harassment against newcomers. We also reviewed a high-severity report against core_maintainer and determined it was a false positive consistent with brigading rather than abuse. Related reports were closed after review. Medium- and low-severity reports remain for normal triage.
